functions.body:
if [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
  return 0
fi
CONTENT="${CONTENT:-}"
local tmpl="" tmp_tmpl="" tmp_final="" extra="" file_content=""
if [ -n "$JSON_INPUT" ]; then CONTENT=""; return 0; fi
if [ "${#FILE_INPUTS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
  CONTENT="$(collect_input_from_files "${FILE_INPUTS[@]}")"
  if [ "${#ARGS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    extra="$(expand_args_to_content)"
    [ -n "$extra" ] && CONTENT="${CONTENT}"$'\n\n'"$extra"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "$TEMPLATE" ]; then
  if [ "${#FILE_INPUTS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    CONTENT="$(collect_input_from_files "${FILE_INPUTS[@]}")"
  elif [ -n "$STDIN_CONTENT" ]; then
    CONTENT="$STDIN_CONTENT"
  else
    if [ "${#ARGS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then CONTENT="$(expand_args_to_content)"; else CONTENT=""; fi
  fi
  tmpl="$(cat "$BASH4LLM_TEMPLATES_DIR/$TEMPLATE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  tmp_tmpl="$(_mktemp_in_dir "$RUN_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$tmp_tmpl" ]; then
    printf '%s' "$tmpl" | awk -v repl="$CONTENT" '{ gsub(/\{\{CONTENT\}\}/, repl); print }' > "$tmp_tmpl"
    tmp_final="${tmp_tmpl}.final"
    mv "$tmp_tmpl" "$tmp_final" 2>/dev/null || true
    file_content="$(cat "$tmp_final" 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$tmpl")"
    CONTENT="$file_content"
    rm -f "$tmp_final" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    CONTENT="$(printf '%s' "$tmpl" | awk -v repl="$CONTENT" '{ gsub(/\{\{CONTENT\}\}/, repl); print }')"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "$STDIN_CONTENT" ]; then
  CONTENT="$STDIN_CONTENT"
  if [ "${#ARGS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    extra="$(expand_args_to_content)"
    [ -n "$extra" ] && CONTENT="${CONTENT}"$'\n\n'"$extra"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if [ "${#ARGS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then CONTENT="$(expand_args_to_content)"; else CONTENT=""; fi
return 0

blocks.body:
if [ "$PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE" -eq 1 ] || [ "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" = "list" ]; then
  IFS=' ' read -r -a _prov_arr <<EOF
$SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS
EOF
  current_default="$PROVIDER"
  if [ -f "$(canonical_provider_file)" ]; then
    pf="$(sed -n '1p' "$(canonical_provider_file)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    pf="$(printf '%s' "$pf" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    [ -n "$pf" ] && current_default="$pf"
  fi
  printf 'Select provider:\n' >&2
  i=1
  for p in ${_prov_arr[@]+"${_prov_arr[@]}"}; do
    if [ "$p" = "$current_default" ]; then
      printf '%d) %s (default)\n' "$i" "$p" >&2
    else
      printf '%d) %s\n' "$i" "$p" >&2
    fi
    i=$((i+1))
  done
  printf '> ' >&2
  if ! IFS= read -r sel; then
    printf 'No selection made.\n' >&2
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  sel="$(trim "$sel")"
  if [ -z "$sel" ]; then
    chosen="$current_default"
  else
    if printf '%s\n' "$sel" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$'; then
      idx="$sel"
      chosen="${_prov_arr[$((idx-1))]}"
    else
      chosen=""
      for p in ${_prov_arr[@]+"${_prov_arr[@]}"}; do
        if [ "$p" = "$sel" ]; then
          chosen="$p"
          break
        fi
      done
    fi
  fi
  [ -n "$chosen" ] || { log_error "PROVIDER" "Selection out of range or unknown provider."; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
  prev_provider="$PROVIDER"
  if ! ensure_config_dir; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "cannot persist provider selection: config dir unavailable."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  target_provider_file="$(canonical_provider_file)"
  if ! printf '%s\n' "$chosen" | atomic_write "$target_provider_file" 10; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "cannot persist provider selection to $target_provider_file."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  chmod 600 "$target_provider_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -f "$(canonical_provider_url_file)" 2>/dev/null || true
  PROVIDER="$chosen"
  resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE_SELECTED=1
  if ! load_provider_module "$PROVIDER"; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "failed to load provider module: $PROVIDER"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE_SELECTED:-}" ] && [ "$#" -eq 0 ]; then
    log_info_user "PROVIDER" "Provider set to: ${PROVIDER:-}"
    exit 0
  fi
fi
if [ "${PROVIDER:-}" = "groq" ]; then
  prov_file="$(canonical_provider_url_file)"
  if [ ! -f "$prov_file" ] || [ ! -s "$prov_file" ]; then
    embedded_url="https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions"
    write_provider_url_if_missing "groq" "$embedded_url" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
fi
if [ "${PROVIDER_MODULE_LOADED:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if ! validate_provider_interface "$PROVIDER"; then
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
  fi
else
  if ! load_provider_module "$PROVIDER"; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "failed to load provider module: $PROVIDER"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  if ! validate_provider_interface "$PROVIDER"; then
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
  fi
fi
if [ "${REFRESH_MODELS:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  if ! ensure_api_key_for_provider "$PROVIDER"; then
    log_error "APIKEY" "API key required to refresh models for provider $PROVIDER."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
  fi
  refresh_models_dispatch "$MODELS_FILE" || exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
  exit 0
fi
if [ ! -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
  if ! ensure_api_key_for_provider "$PROVIDER"; then
    log_error "APIKEY" "API key required to refresh models for provider $PROVIDER."
  else
    refresh_models_dispatch "$MODELS_FILE" || true
  fi
fi

if [ "${PRINT_CONFIG_DIR:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_config_dir)"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${PRINT_PROVIDER_FILE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_provider_file)"
  exit 0
fi
if [ -n "${PRINT_MODEL_FILE:-}" ]; then
  printf '%s\n' "$(canonical_model_file "${PRINT_MODEL_FILE}")"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${SHOW_CONFIG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  : "${ALLOWED_MODELS:=}"
  printf '%s configuration:\n' "${C_GBOLD}Bash4LLM⁺${C_RST}"
  printf '  - Name: %s\n' "$SCRIPT_NAME"
  printf '  - Version: %s\n' "$SCRIPT_VERSION"
  printf '  - Date: %s\n' "$SCRIPT_DATE"
  printf '  - Provider: %s\n' "$PROVIDER"
  printf '  - Model: %s\n' "$MODEL"
  printf '  - Temperature: %s\n' "$TEMPERATURE"
  printf '  - Max Tokens: %s\n' "$MAX_TOKENS"
  printf '  - Output Format: %s\n' "$OUTPUT_MODE"
  printf '  - Save Threshold: %sB\n' "$THRESHOLD"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${DIAGNOSTICS:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  : "${ALLOWED_MODELS:=}"
  printf '%s diagnostics:\n' "${C_GBOLD}Bash4LLM⁺${C_RST}"
  printf '  - Config Dir: %s\n' "$(canonical_config_dir)"
  printf '  - Provider File: %s\n' "$(canonical_provider_file)"
  printf '  - History Dir: %s\n' "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR"
  printf '  - Temp Dir: %s\n' "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"
  printf '  - Active Temp Dir: %s\n' "${RUN_TMPDIR:-<none>}"
  printf '  - Models File: %s\n' "$MODELS_FILE"
  allowed_count=0
  if [ -n "$ALLOWED_MODELS" ]; then
    allowed_count="$(printf '%s\n' "$ALLOWED_MODELS" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
  fi
  printf '  - Allowed Models Count: %d\n' "$allowed_count"
  if [ "${BASH4LLM_VAULT_ENABLED:-1}" -eq 0 ]; then
    printf '  - Security Extension (OpenSSL): %b[DISABLED]%b (By user configuration BASH4LLM_VAULT_ENABLED=0)\n' "${C_BYELLOW:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
  elif [ "${BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ -n "${_B4L_RT_CTX:-}" ]; then
      printf '  - Security Extension (OpenSSL): %b[ACTIVE]%b (Session unlocked via runtime context)\n' "${C_BGREEN:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
    else
      printf '  - Security Extension (OpenSSL): %b[ACTIVE]%b (Locked/Ready)\n' "${C_BGREEN:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
    fi
    printf '    * PBKDF2 Support: '
    if [ "${_BASH4LLM_VAULT_PBKDF2:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'YES\n'; else printf 'NO (Legacy KDF)\n'; fi
    printf '    * Key Vault Status: '
    if vault_exists; then printf 'INITIALIZED (%s)\n' "$(basename "${_VAULT_FILE:-keys.enc}")"; else printf 'NOT INITIALIZED\n'; fi
    resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    if [ -n "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then
      current_host=""
      current_host="$(printf '%s' "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL}" | sed -E 's#https?://([^:/]+).*#\1#')"
      printf '    * TLS Handshake (%s): ' "$current_host"
      if diagnose_tls_connection "$BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        printf '%bSUCCESS%b\n' "${C_GREEN:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
      else
        printf '%bFAILED%b (Handshake failed, local trust store missing, or connection proxy blocked)\n' "${C_RED:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
      fi
    fi
  else
    printf '  - Security Extension (OpenSSL): %b[NOT AVAILABLE]%b (openssl-helper.sh or openssl binary missing)\n' "${C_BRED:-}" "${C_RST:-}"
  fi
  exit 0
fi

if [ "${BOOTSTRAP_ONLY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  exit 0
fi
load_local_config
load_whitelist
if ! ensure_run_tmpdir; then
  log_error "TMP" "cannot create or access RUN_TMPDIR ($BASH4LLM_TMPDIR). Aborting."
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_PROVIDER_URL:-}" ]; then
  resolve_provider_url "${PROVIDER:-}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi
if ! resolve_model; then
  log_error "MODEL" "no model could be selected."
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_BAD_MODEL"
fi
if ! validate_model_core "$FINAL_MODEL"; then
  log_error "MODEL" "model failed core validation: $FINAL_MODEL"
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_BAD_MODEL"
fi
if ! validate_model_dispatch "$FINAL_MODEL"; then
  log_error "MODEL" "invalid model for provider $PROVIDER: $FINAL_MODEL"
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_BAD_MODEL"
fi
MODEL="$FINAL_MODEL"
STDIN_CONTENT=""
if [ ! -t 0 ]; then
  stdin_buffer="$(cat - 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$stdin_buffer" ] && printf '%s' "$stdin_buffer" | jq -e 'has("api_key")' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    extracted_key="$(printf '%s' "$stdin_buffer" | jq -r '.api_key // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
    extracted_prompt="$(printf '%s' "$stdin_buffer" | jq -r '.prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
    extracted_json_input="$(printf '%s' "$stdin_buffer" | jq -c '.json_input // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
    stdin_buffer="CLEARED_AND_OVERWRITTEN_$(printf '%08x' $((RANDOM & 0xFFFF)))"
    if [ -n "$extracted_key" ]; then
      prov_var="$(provider_api_env_var_name "${PROVIDER:-groq}")"
      export "$prov_var"="$extracted_key"
      export BASH4LLM_API_KEY="$extracted_key"
      if [ "${PROVIDER:-groq}" = "groq" ]; then
        export GROQ_API_KEY="$extracted_key"
      fi
      extracted_key=""
    fi
    if [ -n "$extracted_json_input" ]; then
      JSON_INPUT="$extracted_json_input"
      extracted_json_input=""
    elif [ -n "$extracted_prompt" ]; then
      CONTENT="$extracted_prompt"
      extracted_prompt=""
    fi
  else
    STDIN_CONTENT="$stdin_buffer"
    stdin_buffer=""
  fi
fi

assemble_content
if [ -n "${PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE_SELECTED:-}" ] && [ "$#" -eq 0 ] && [ -z "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
  log_info_user "PROVIDER" "Provider set to: ${PROVIDER:-}"
  exit 0
fi
if [ -n "${JSON_INPUT:-}" ] && is_valid_json_string "${JSON_INPUT}"; then
  :
elif [ -z "${CONTENT:-}" ] && [ -z "${BATCH_FILE:-}" ] && [ "${CHAT_MODE:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ -z "${SET_DEFAULT_MODEL:-}" ] && [ "${REFRESH_MODELS:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ "${LIST_MODELS:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ "${INIT_THREAD:-0}" -ne 1 ]; then
  log_error "PROMPT" "prompt content is empty. Please provide a prompt or use chat/batch mode."
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_PROMPT"
fi
if [ -n "$BATCH_FILE" ]; then
  while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do
    case "$line" in ''|\#*) continue ;; esac
    CONTENT="$line"
    if [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
      if ! thread_validate_id "$THREAD_ID"; then
        log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $THREAD_ID"
        exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
      fi
      safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/threads" 700
      if [ -n "${THREAD_WINDOW:-}" ]; then
        if ! printf '%s' "$THREAD_WINDOW" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$' ; then
          THREAD_WINDOW=10
        fi
      else
        THREAD_WINDOW=10
      fi
      if [ "$THREAD_WINDOW" -gt 20 ]; then
        log_warn "THREAD" "thread-window > 20 requested ($THREAD_WINDOW); recommended <= 20"
      fi
      ensure_run_tmpdir || { log_error "THREAD" "cannot create run tmpdir"; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
      BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE="${RUN_TMPDIR%/}/thread-${THREAD_ID}-messages.json"
      export BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE
      if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        if ! session_engine_build_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "${BASH4LLM_SESSION_TARGET_BYTES:-}" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then
          log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_build_window failed; falling back to legacy thread_read_window"
          thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || log_warn "THREAD" "legacy thread_read_window also failed"
        fi
      else
        thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || log_warn "THREAD" "legacy thread_read_window failed"
      fi
      if [ ! -f "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE:-}" ] || [ "$(jq -r '.messages | length' "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" -eq 0 ]; then
        jq -n --arg role "user" --arg content "${CONTENT:-}" '{messages:[{role:$role,content:$content}] }' > "${BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE}"
      fi
    fi
    build_payload_from_vars
    if ! ensure_api_key_for_provider "$PROVIDER"; then
      log_error "APIKEY" "missing API key; aborting batch item."
      continue
    fi
    if [ "$STREAM_MODE" -eq 1 ]; then
      call_api_streaming || log_error "CALL" "Error during streaming call."
    else
      perform_request_once || true
    fi
    printf '\n----\n'
  done < "$BATCH_FILE"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$CHAT_MODE" -eq 1 ]; then
  BASH4LLM_CORE_SCRIPT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd)/$(basename "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"
  export BASH4LLM_CORE_SCRIPT
  export BASH4LLM_ACTIVE_THREAD="${THREAD_ID}"
  export BASH4LLM_ACTIVE_MODEL="${MODEL}"
  export BASH4LLM_ACTIVE_TEMPERATURE="${TEMPERATURE}"
  tui_script="${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR}/chat/tui-repl.sh"
  if [ -f "$tui_script" ]; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "CHAT" "Executing external TUI REPL: $tui_script"
    fi
    bash "$tui_script" "$@"
    exit $?
  else
    log_error "CHAT" "Interactive TUI REPL script not found at: $tui_script"
    log_error "CHAT" "Please install optional extras using: $0 --install-extras"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
fi
if [ "$STREAM_MODE" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
    if ! thread_validate_id "$THREAD_ID"; then
      log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $THREAD_ID"
      exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
    fi
    safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/threads" 700
    if [ -n "${THREAD_WINDOW:-}" ]; then
      if ! printf '%s' "$THREAD_WINDOW" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$' ; then
        THREAD_WINDOW=10
      fi
    else
      THREAD_WINDOW=10
    fi
    if [ "$THREAD_WINDOW" -gt 20 ]; then
      log_warn "THREAD" "thread-window > 20 requested ($THREAD_WINDOW); recommended <= 20"
    fi
    ensure_run_tmpdir || { log_error "THREAD" "cannot create run tmpdir"; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
    BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE="$RUN_TMPDIR/thread-${THREAD_ID}-messages.json"
    if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      if ! session_engine_build_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "${BASH4LLM_SESSION_TARGET_BYTES:-}" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
        log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_build_window failed; falling back to legacy thread_read_window"
        if ! thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
          log_warn "THREAD" "failed to read thread window for $THREAD_ID"
          rm -f "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
        fi
      fi
    else
      if ! thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
        log_warn "THREAD" "failed to read thread window for $THREAD_ID"
        rm -f "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    fi
    export BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE
  fi
  build_payload_from_vars
  if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "DRY" "dry-run: skipping API key check for provider $PROVIDER"
    fi
  else
    if ! ensure_api_key_for_provider "$PROVIDER"; then
      log_error "APIKEY" "missing API key; aborting."
      exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
    fi
  fi
  if call_api_streaming; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "STREAM" "Streaming completed; captured response in $RESP"
    fi
    if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
      if [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
        meta_source="cli"
        meta_cmd="$(thread_sanitize_cmd "$0 ${ARGS[*]:-}")"
        meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg source "$meta_source" --arg cmd "$meta_cmd" --arg id "" '{source:$source, cmd:$cmd, id:$id}')"
        if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          if ! session_engine_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append message to thread $THREAD_ID (streaming)"
          fi
        else
          thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append message to thread $THREAD_ID (streaming)"
        fi
      fi
      if [ -s "${RESP:-}" ]; then
        assistant_text="$(extract_text_from_resp 2>/dev/null || true)"
        assistant_text="$(printf '%s' "$assistant_text" | sed -e 's/\r$//' -e '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' || true)"
        if [ -n "${assistant_text:-}" ]; then
          meta_source="provider"
          meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg source "$meta_source" --arg model "$MODEL" --arg id "" '{source:$source, model:$model, id:$id}')"
          if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
            if ! session_engine_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json"; then
              log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_append (assistant) failed; falling back to legacy thread_append"
              thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append assistant response to thread $THREAD_ID (streaming)"
            fi
          else
            thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append assistant response to thread $THREAD_ID (streaming)"
          fi
        fi
      fi
    fi
  else
    rc=$?
    log_error "STREAM" "streaming request failed with code $rc"
    exit "$rc"
  fi
  printf '\n'
  exit 0
fi
if is_tty_out && [ "$QUIET" -ne 1 ] && { [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "text" ] || [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" = "raw" ]; }; then
  if [ -n "$C_BCYAN" ]; then
    printf '%sYou:%s\n' "${C_BCYAN}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  else
    printf 'You:\n' >&2
  fi
  if [ "${#ARGS[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    anyfile=0
    for a in ${ARGS[@]+"${ARGS[@]}"}; do [ -r "$a" ] && [ -f "$a" ] && { anyfile=1; break; }; done
    [ "$anyfile" -eq 1 ] && printf '%s\n' "(using file contents)" >&2 || printf '%s\n' "$CONTENT" >&2
  else
    printf '%s\n' "$CONTENT" >&2
  fi
  if [ -n "$C_BGREEN" ]; then
    printf '\n%s%s:%s\n' "${C_BGREEN}" "${MODEL:-default}" "${C_RST}" >&2
  else
    printf '\n%s:\n' "${MODEL:-default}" >&2
  fi
fi
if [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
  if ! thread_validate_id "$THREAD_ID"; then
    log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $THREAD_ID"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/threads" 700
  if [ -n "${THREAD_WINDOW:-}" ]; then
    if ! printf '%s' "$THREAD_WINDOW" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$' ; then
      THREAD_WINDOW=10
    fi
  else
    THREAD_WINDOW=10
  fi
  if [ "$THREAD_WINDOW" -gt 20 ]; then
    log_warn "THREAD" "thread-window > 20 requested ($THREAD_WINDOW); recommended <= 20"
  fi
  ensure_run_tmpdir || { log_error "THREAD" "cannot create run tmpdir"; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
  BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE="$RUN_TMPDIR/thread-${THREAD_ID}-messages.json"
  if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    if ! session_engine_build_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "${BASH4LLM_SESSION_TARGET_BYTES:-}" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
      log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_build_window failed; falling back to legacy thread_read_window"
      if ! thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
        log_warn "THREAD" "failed to read thread window for $THREAD_ID"
        rm -f "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    fi
  else
    if ! thread_read_window "$THREAD_ID" "$THREAD_WINDOW" "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE"; then
      log_warn "THREAD" "failed to read thread window for $THREAD_ID"
      rm -f "$BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
  fi
  export BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE
fi
build_payload_from_vars
if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "DRY" "dry-run: skipping API key check for provider $PROVIDER"
  fi
else
  if ! ensure_api_key_for_provider "$PROVIDER"; then
    log_error "APIKEY" "missing API key; aborting."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_NO_API_KEY"
  fi
fi
if perform_request_once; then
  if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
    if [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
      meta_source="cli"
      meta_cmd="$(thread_sanitize_cmd "$0 ${ARGS[*]:-}")"
      meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg source "$meta_source" --arg cmd "$meta_cmd" --arg id "" '{source:$source, cmd:$cmd, id:$id}')"
      if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        if ! session_engine_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json"; then
          log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_append (user) failed; falling back to legacy thread_append"
          thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append message to thread $THREAD_ID"
        fi
      else
        thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append message to thread $THREAD_ID"
      fi
    fi
    if [ -s "${RESP:-}" ]; then
      assistant_text="$(extract_text_from_resp 2>/dev/null || true)"
      assistant_text="$(printf '%s' "$assistant_text" | sed -e 's/\r$//' -e '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' || true)"
      if [ -n "${assistant_text:-}" ]; then
        meta_source="provider"
        meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg source "$meta_source" --arg model "$MODEL" --arg id "" '{source:$source, model:$model, id:$id}')"
        if [ "${_engine_available:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          if ! session_engine_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json"; then
            log_warn "THREAD" "session_engine_append (assistant) failed; falling back to legacy thread_append"
            thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append assistant response to thread $THREAD_ID"
          fi
        else
          thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "assistant" "$assistant_text" "$meta_json" || log_warn "THREAD" "failed to append assistant response to thread $THREAD_ID"
        fi
      fi
    fi
  fi
else
  rc=$?
  if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ -n "${THREAD_ID:-}" ] && [ -n "${CONTENT:-}" ]; then
    meta_source="cli"
    meta_cmd="$(thread_sanitize_cmd "$0 ${ARGS[*]:-}")"
    meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg source "$meta_source" --arg cmd "$meta_cmd" --arg id "" '{source:$source, cmd:$cmd, id:$id}')"
    thread_append "$THREAD_ID" "user" "$CONTENT" "$meta_json" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  exit "$rc"
fi
